Markdown extensions

Editing behavior
Misc
bulletListMarker
orderListDelimiter
frontmatterType
UI plugin hints
  • Hover the left margin of any paragraph → drag handle + paragraph menu (heading / list / quote conversion).
  • Select text → inline format toolbar (B / I / Code / Link / …).
  • Type / in an empty paragraph → quick insert menu.
  • Type : → emoji picker.
  • Hover a table row / column → drag bar, row-col menu, column toolbar.
  • Hover an image → resize handles + image toolbar; click an empty image placeholder → image edit tool.
  • Click the language label of a code block → language selector.
  • Hover a link → link tools (edit / open / unlink).
  • Hover a footnote reference → footnote editor.
  • Hover a diagram / math / html block → preview toolbar (source ↔ preview).
